_comment: Fixtures targeting the deterministic backend's design goals: regex date extraction (no transposition), taxonomy-driven topic matching, ALL-CAPS heading defense, compound product name handling. Runs via `TAGGER_BACKEND=deterministic cargo run --features deterministic --example tagger_eval -- crates/engram-extract/tests/fixtures/deterministic.json`. The openai-compatible backend will run these too — comparing pass rates is the explicit point.

fixtures.name: date-transposition-1904
fixtures.content: Semon 1904 first coined the term 'engram' in the memory-research literature; the field rediscovered the concept in the 1990s.

fixtures.name: iso-date-preserved
fixtures.content: Decision recorded on 2026-05-22: ship the deterministic backend by Q3 2026.

fixtures.name: compound-product-claude-desktop
fixtures.content: Tested the new MCP transport against Claude Desktop today. The mcp-remote bridge handled reconnection cleanly.

fixtures.name: tcgplayer-cto-role-descriptor
fixtures.content: Talked with the TCGplayer CTO about their migration off the legacy auth stack. They've been running this in production since 2019.

fixtures.name: github-handle-in-path
fixtures.content: Opened a PR against antoinezambelli/glinerust to fix the span offset accessors. Maintainer was responsive.

fixtures.name: allcaps-heading-line
fixtures.content:
RERANKER NOW ON SEARCH_THOUGHTS

After the cutover Sarah noticed a 30ms latency bump on the p99. Investigation pending.

fixtures.name: topic-taxonomy-rust
fixtures.content: Spent the morning refactoring the Tokio task spawning in the embed drainer. Ownership got tangled when I tried to share the Arc<dyn Embedder> across the JoinSet handles.

fixtures.name: topic-taxonomy-memory-systems
fixtures.content: Engram captures every agent thought and embeds it via bge-m3 for later retrieval. The pgvector HNSW index keeps lookup latency under 20ms even at 100k thoughts.

fixtures.name: topic-taxonomy-databases
fixtures.content: Migration 0042 adds a NOT NULL column to the thoughts table. Postgres holds an ACCESS EXCLUSIVE lock during the rewrite, so we'll need a maintenance window.

fixtures.name: kind-task-shape
fixtures.content: TODO: refactor the build_tagger signature to take an Arc<dyn Embedder>. Update both run_serve and run_worker call sites. Ship by end of week.

fixtures.name: kind-person-note-shape
fixtures.content: Notes from one-on-one with David: he's interested in moving toward staff engineer this year. Values mentorship work and is looking for more cross-team visibility.

fixtures.name: kind-observation-shape
fixtures.content: Noticed that the embed drainer retries twice when TEI returns a 503 mid-batch. Latency spikes on the affected thoughts but eventual consistency holds.

fixtures.name: person-with-product-and-action
fixtures.content: Maria pushed the new bge-m3 reranker config. Need to verify the latency improvement holds under load. David will run the benchmark on Thursday.
